title: Verify existing implementation of format-currency utility
description: The format-currency utility in src/utils/format-currency.ts and its test file already exist with full implementation covering basic formatting, currency options, locale-aware formatting, symbol options, edge cases, and combined options. No additional implementation needed.
existing_patterns: src/utils/format-currency.ts follows the utility module pattern with a single exported function and supporting helpers
src/utils/format-currency.test.ts uses vitest with describe/it/expect structure
